text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as we get back from our day out...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: My phone's ringing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hello, this is Air Groove. Yes? Mm-hm... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Is that right? You found a home?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The call was from the animal protection group.
They've found a family to take in the puppy Air
Groove has been temporarily housing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, they'll come to the academy
tomorrow to pick her up.
choice_data_list: It's gonna be lonely with her gone.
It's gonna be lonely with her gone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hey now. You know how observant she is—if you
make that dejected expression, she'll be able to
tell.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This arrangement was never meant to last. If you
plan to come along tonorrow, you'd better see
her off with a smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day arrives in the blink of an eye, and
it's time for our final goodbyes.

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof!

text_block_list.name: New Owner
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what a lovely coat! I can tell you've really
looked after her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I merely did what anyone would have.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so modest! Air Groove has taught her all
the basic commands.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: She's especially good at fetch!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's enough, Fine.

text_block_list.name: New Owner
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's a relief knowing that she was in such
capable hands.

text_block_list.name: New Owner
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure to take good care of her from here
on out! C'mere, you cutie!

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof, woof! Whine...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh! She's heading over to Groove...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now, now! You know better than to ignore a
command!

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you know this. When your new owner
says "come," you go. Got it?

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The puppy turns away from Air Groove and heads
to her new owner.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, Groove...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This is for the best.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Are you really okay with this, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's question catches me off guard. I
turn to the new owner.
choice_data_list: Can we spend just a little more time with her?
Have you decided on a name?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's gotten into you?

text_block_list.name: New Owner
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I think it would be good for the puppy
too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, if it's good for her...
choice_data_list: You can't hide how you really feel.

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, now...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Haha... You really are a clever little thing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Let's let them have some time alone.

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof woof!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No eating random things off the street, okay?
Drink lots of water. Don't nap anywhere silly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Also...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Agh, there's just too much I want to say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Allowing herself to be honest with her feelings for
the time being, Air Groove makes the most of her
final moments with the puppy.

text_block_list.name: New Owner
text_block_list.text: A name? No, not yet. I wanted to meet her first.

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof!

text_block_list.name: New Owner
text_block_list.text: I know. Why don't you name her, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: M-me? Heavens no!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea! You know her better than
anyone, after all. How about it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: H-hold on! A name is for life! How could I—

text_block_list.name: New Owner
text_block_list.text: Please. For her sake.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Nngh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove stares at the puppy in silence for a
little while. Finally, she opens her mouth and
mutters...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Perhaps we can call you... "Maple."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Maple? Hm... Makes me think of a life filled with
bright colors and all kinds of joy.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What a thoughtful name, Groove. I should've
known you wouldn't accept anything short of
perfect!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I hope it's fitting.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I wish you all the best, Maple.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove smiles at the puppy—and her little
friend excitedly barks back.

text_block_list.name: New Owner
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I actually live kind of close to here. I've
heard the park near the academy is a good place
for walking dogs!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh... Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Then you won't be too far from each other! That's
good to hear. Right, Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Perhaps, but I thought it might be best for
her to forget about me.

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Looks like that won't be happening anytime soon.
As you said, she's quite smart.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh...
choice_data_list: How about we jog at that park sometime?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Nobody asked for your opinion!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Maybe once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her cool exterior, Air Groove asks me to
change our running course.
